title: add Stability AI brand logo
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
The new `stable-audio-2.5` model (brand `Stability AI`) had no brand logo, so the models table fell back to no icon.

- Adds `brand-logos/stability.svg` (monochrome `currentColor` mark, same 24×24 / `<g transform>` convention as the other 25 logos).
- Maps `"Stability AI" → stability` in `model-info.ts` `BRAND_LOGOS`.

No build artifacts touched (`dist/` isn't committed; `public/` is served statically).

gist.headline: A stable aesthetic
gist.blurb: We've added the official Stability AI logo to the models table. Now stable-audio-2.5 looks just as good as it sounds!
gist.summary: Added the Stability AI brand logo to the frontend models table to properly represent the stable-audio-2.5 model.
gist.impact: The stable-audio-2.5 model now displays its official brand icon in the directory instead of a blank fallback.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee placing a new icon on a display board, with audio waveforms indicating the audio model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully hanging a glowing new pixelated icon on a wooden display board. A chunky retro monitor nearby shows colorful audio waveforms. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
